title: Else Nutrition begins selling its child nutrition products on Kroger.com
text: Else Nutrition Holdings Inc (OTCQX:BABYF, TSX-V:BABY) announced that its plant-based, complete nutrition products for toddlers and children are now available on Kroger.com.  The company said Kroger saw its e-commerce sales jump by 79% to US$11.2 billion in 2020, according to eMarketer.

title: 5 of Warren Buffett's Largest Stock Holdings Also Pay Big Dependable Dividends
text: If any investor has stood the test of time, it is Warren Buffett, and with good reason.

title: Kroger Earns Top Score in Human Rights Campaign Foundation's 2022 Corporate Equality Index for Fourth Year in a Row
text: CINCINNATI, Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR), America's largest grocer, proudly announced today that it again received a top score of 100 on the Human Rights Campaign Foundation's 2022 Corporate Equality Index, the nation's foremost benchmarking survey and report measuring corporate policies and practices related to LGBTQ+ workplace equality. "We're incredibly honored to receive this recognition, and we're proud of every action our associates and leaders have taken to foster a more diverse, equitable and inclusive culture across The Kroger Family of Companies," said Tim Massa, Kroger's senior vice president and chief people officer.

title: Kroger Fulfillment Network Expands to Louisville, Kentucky
text: LOUISVILLE, Ky., Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR), America's largest grocery retailer, today announced it will offer more Americans delivery through the addition of a spoke facility in Louisville, Kentucky powered by the Ocado Group (LSE: OCDO) and combining vertical integration, machine learning, and robotics to provide an affordable, friendly, and fast fresh food delivery service as part of the company's seamless ecosystem.

title: Kroger supplier Ocado unveils advanced robots to pick, pack groceries
text: From lightweight robots to hi-tech van routing systems, British online supermarket Ocado unveiled a suite of innovations on Wednesday it predicted would raise its returns and win new customers for its technology.

title: Ocado unveils lighter robots to help grocery giants like Kroger take on Amazon
text: The U.K. company sells its retail automation technology to top retailers including Kroger, Britain's Morrisons and France's Casino.

title: Tuesday's 5 S&P 500 Winners and 5 Losers in the Premarket
text: The three major U.S. equities indexes posted small gains on Monday to break a four-day streak of losses.

title: Worker Shortages: How Kroger, Piggly Wiggly And Whole Foods Cope
text: Retailers ended 2021 scrambling to cover for a worker shortage, and food sellers likely felt the worst of the squeeze as shopper demand at the grocery climbed. Self-checkout helps, but stores need workers to answer questions, stock inventory and prepare foods.

title: Strike ends at 78 Kroger-owned grocery stores in Denver
text: Nearly 8,000 workers at 78 King Soopers and City Market grocery stores in Colorado will return to work starting Friday, after union leaders and management reached a tentative three-year work agreement.

title: Workers end strike at Kroger's King Soopers after reaching tentative deal
text: The union representing more than 8,000 workers at nearly 80 Kroger Co-owned King Soopers stores have decided to end their strike after reaching a tentative deal with the U.S. retail giant, the United Food and Commercial Workers Local 7 union said on Friday.

title: Kroger's Resilient Shares Look Like They're Due For A Correction
text: Kroger's shares have been resilient through thick and thin. The company has put up years of market share gains thanks to investments in digital capabilities that have put it ahead of rivals, in our view.

title: The Ratings Game: Kroger stock upgraded but grocers face hurdles from inflation, store traffic and more in 2022, says Bank of America
text: Kroger Co. was upgraded to neutral from underperform at Bank of America, but analysts say food retailers face myriad challenges in 2022, including inflation and supply chain problems.

title: Schaeffer's Top Stock Picks of 2022: Kroger
text: Every day for the past week, we've been highlighting one of Schaeffer's top seven picks for 2022.

title: Here's How Kroger (KR) is Fortifying Position in Industry
text: Kroger (KR) has been making significant investments to enhance product freshness and quality and expand digital capabilities.

title: Munk Pack Expands Into Kroger and Meijer Stores
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Leading low-sugar snack brand, Munk Pack – known for creating snacks that are equally as delicious as they are nutritious – announces today the expansion of its Keto Nut & Seed Bars into Kroger and Meijer. The news highlights the brand's exponential growth in the past year, with sales of Munk Pack's Keto Nut & Seed Bars growing more than 600 percent in the conventional channel, while dollar velocities for the product line also grew by more than 100 per

title: Kroger Announces 10 Food Trend Predictions for 2022
text: CINCINNATI, Jan. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR), America's largest grocery retailer, today announced its 2022 Food Trends Report, which predicts emerging food trends, consumer behaviors and popular items for the year ahead. This fourth-annual report centers on the continued dominance of at-home meals, powered by convenience, affordability, social gatherings, and the desire for sustainable and nutrient-rich food items.

title: Kroger employees are surrounded by food at work — but many struggle to afford food and rent, says a survey of 10,200 workers
text: Many supermarket workers struggle to put food on the table even as they help feed their communities, according to new research on Kroger KR, -0.51% employees released as the pandemic continues to expose and exacerbate essential workers' financial and health challenges.

title: Kroger (KR), Nuro Extend Deal to Expedite Grocery Delivery
text: Kroger (KR) is making constant efforts to facilitate quick deliveries of fresh grocery. It stretches its tie-up with Nuro to make efficient deliveries via a third-generation autonomous delivery vehicle.

title: Instacart teams up with Kroger, Publix and other grocers for ready-made meals
text: Instacart will now deliver ready-made meals from several grocers, including Kroger and Publix.

title: 4 Top Dividend Payers of the S&P 500
text: These stocks could one day be paying dividends of 7% or higher.

title: Kroger Health Wins 2022 American Pharmacists Association Immunization Champion Award
text: CINCINNATI, Jan. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Kroger Health, the healthcare division of The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR), receives the 2022 American Pharmacists Association (APhA) Immunization Champion Award. The award recognizes individuals and organizations making extraordinary contributions toward improved vaccination rates within their communities.

title: Kroger and Nuro Announce Expanded Collaboration, Showcasing New Autonomous Vehicles Set to Power Grocery Delivery Service
text: CINCINNATI and MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., Jan. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) and Nuro announced today an expanded collaboration to continue redefining the customer experience leveraging autonomous vehicles with the introduction of Nuro's third-generation autonomous delivery vehicle.

title: Why Are Denver Kroger Workers On Strike?
text: Grocery workers in Denver and Colorado Springs are on strike. A new report provides startling context about the poverty and food insecurity that such essential workers face.

title: Workers at nearly 80 Kroger's King Soopers go on strike as talks stall
text: More than 8,000 workers at nearly 80 King Soopers stores went on strike for better wages and benefits on Wednesday after the latest round of negotiations between the Kroger Co-owned Colorado chain and the union failed.

title: King Soopers and City Market Open for Customers
text: DENVER, Jan. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, King Soopers and City Market called the decision by UFCW Local 7 to strike reckless and self-serving, without regard for the implications to associates and Coloradans. "Local 7 is putting politics before people and preventing us from putting more money in our associates' pockets," said Joe Kelley, president of King Soopers and City Market.

title: Analysis Shows The Kroger Co.'s Supermarket Divisions in Western States Pays Hourly Associates More Than Their Peers in The Retail Industry Overall
text: CINCINNATI, Jan. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) released an analysis, Kroger Stores Benefit Western Communities: An Assessment of the Enterprise's Compensation Packages and the Economic Impacts in the West  that documents the organization's compensation of its nearly 85,000 hourly associates in four Western states: California, Colorado, Oregon, and Washington. The ndp | analytics report, commissioned by The Kroger Family of Companies, highlights the robust economic and social contributions Kroger makes to these four states, including noteworthy employment of – and opportunities for – communities of color and lower-income populations.

title: Kroger's King Soopers sweetens offer ahead of union strike
text: Kroger's King Soopers sweetened its offer to workers to $170 million, a day before workers have threatened to go on strike, calling it their last, best and final offer.

title: King Soopers/City Market Offers Monumental Investment while UFCW threatens Disruption
text: DENVER, Jan. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, King Soopers/City Market proposed, by email, a Last, Best and Final Offer to UFCW Local 7. The investment of $170 million over the next three years includes wage investments plus ratification bonuses for all associates.

title: Home Chef Names Erik Jensen Chief Executive Officer
text: CHICAGO, Jan. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  Home Chef , a leading meal solutions brand, announced today that Erik Jensen, president of Home Chef, will be promoted to Chief Executive Officer on February 1. Pat Vihtelic, founder of Home Chef, will continue to serve on the company's advisory board throughout 2022.

title: King Soopers/City Market Files Unfair Labor Practice Charges against UFCW Local 7 for Failure to Meet and Negotiate in Good Faith
text: DENVER, Jan. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, King Soopers and City Market filed unfair labor practice charges against UFCW Local 7 for refusing to bargain in good faith. Additionally, Local 7 today rejected mediation services to help aid in a peaceful resolution.

title: As Omicron Surges, Kroger Health Reaches Important Milestone in Virus Response
text: CINCINNATI, Jan. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Kroger Health, the healthcare division of The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) Family of Companies, today achieved the administration of its 10 millionth dose of COVID-19 vaccine. This news comes as the Omicron variant surges across the country and Kroger Health continues to expand its options for the detection, prevention and treatment of COVID-19.

title: Ralphs and Kitchen United MIX open first location
text: LOS ANGELES, Jan. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Ralphs and Kitchen United MIX announced today the opening of the first kitchen center in the Westwood neighborhood of Los Angeles, California. Customers can build their freshly prepared, on-demand restaurant meals from any or all of the participating restaurants to satisfy even the pickiest eaters.

title: Walmart And Kroger Jack Up Prices On COVID At-Home Tests After White House Agreement Not Extended
text: Walmart Inc. (NYSE: WMT) and The Kroger Company (NYSE: KR) have jacked up the price of the BinaxNOW rapid COVID-19 tests after a fixed-price sales deal with the Biden administration expired. What Happened: Fox Business reported that the companies, along with Amazon.com (NASDAQ: AMZN), reached an agreement with the Biden administration in September to sell the antigen self-test kits made by Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT) for $14 for a 100-day period that ended in mid-December.

title: Kroger Soft Launches Grocery Delivery in Atlanta
text: Grocery chain Kroger is continuing its rollout of new customer fulfillment centers (CFC) and expanding home delivery with its latest soft launch in Forest Park, Georgia, from its 375,000-square-foot automated warehouse, according to reports. The $55 million automated CFC is located just south of Atlanta and is the fourth facility Kroger said it was opening […]

title: Walmart and Kroger are raising the prices for at-home COVID-19 tests after a deal with the Biden administration expired
text: The BinaxNOW at-home rapid COVID-19 tests had been sold by both Kroger and Walmart for $14 after a deal with the White House.

text: We start out with a short list of guidelines that make it easier to identify dividend stocks that are still worth investing in right now.
